description: Issue #212 adversarial planted case (verbatim from the issue repro): a single inserted hunk co-locates the exempt phrase 'non-exclusive' (order: FIRST) with a separate, non-exempt 'exclusive' violation in 'Institution shall be the exclusive provider' (order: SECOND). Under the old hunk-wide _is_exempted logic, 'non-exclusive' anywhere in the hunk suppressed ALL 'exclusive' trigger fires, including the unrelated exclusivity grab -- a detector bypass. Must still fire no-exclusivity via SPAN-level exemption: only the 'exclusive' occurrence inside the word 'non-exclusive' is suppressed; the separate 'exclusive provider' occurrence is not.

expected_issues.section_ref: Counterparty introduces exclusivity in either direction.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: This Agreement is non-exclusive as to placements in Arizona. Institution shall be the exclusive provider of interns to Exos nationwide.
planted_variation.notes: Issue #212 repro (order: exempt phrase first, violation second), verbatim from the issue's reproduction. 'non-exclusive' matches exempt_terms and correctly suppresses the 'exclusive' trigger_term occurrence contained within that word. The separate 'exclusive provider' trigger match is a different span entirely and must still fire.

detector_expectation.rationale: Span-level exemption: 'non-exclusive' exempts only the 'exclusive' match spatially inside it. 'the exclusive provider of interns to Exos nationwide' is a separate, non-exempt span and must fire no-exclusivity via the 'exclusive' trigger_term.
